corrections.text: The article states Harada approached Yonemori about 'recreating the way we made things back then,' to which 'Yonemori replied: This looks like so much fun.' Per the EventHubs source (citing Denfaminico Gamer), Yonemori's direct reply to Harada's invitation was 'Let's do it together.' The quote 'This looks like so much fun' is from a separate statement by Yonemori about his general honest reaction to joining the studio, not his conversational reply in that exchange.
